---
title: "STAT 184 — Quiz [N]"
subtitle: "[Date]"
format:
  pdf:
    geometry:
      - margin=1in
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          \usepackage{enumitem}
editor: source
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
**Name (printed):** \hspace{4in}

**This quiz is closed book. No phones, laptops, AI tools, or notes.** You have 25 minutes.

Show your work. Partial credit is available.
:::

\vspace{0.5em}

# Question 1 (X pts)

TODO: question text.

\vspace{1.5in}

# Question 2 (X pts)

TODO: question text.

\vspace{1.5in}

# Question 3 (X pts)

Predict the output of the following code (or explain why it errors):

```{r}
#| eval: false
# TODO: code snippet
```

\vspace{1.5in}

# Question 4 (X pts)

TODO: write-some-code question. Leave space.

\vspace{2in}
